metadata.system_name: Bonsai Survival System — Extended Bug Catalogue
metadata.purpose: Complete immunisation against all encountered bugs from ecosystem development

bug_entries.title: libsqlite3-sys Version Conflict
bug_entries.symptom: error: failed to select a version for `libsqlite3-sys`. ... package links to native library sqlite3 but conflicts
bug_entries.cause: Multiple crates using incompatible rusqlite versions (0.32/0.33/0.37) requiring different libsqlite3-sys versions
bug_entries.fix: Unified all rusqlite to 0.37 and set workspace.dependencies libsqlite3-sys = 0.37
bug_entries.pattern_regex: failed to select a version for `libsqlite3-sys`.*native library.*conflicts

bug_entries.title: cc Crate Version Mismatch
bug_entries.symptom: error: failed to select a version for `cc`. all possible versions conflict
bug_entries.cause: tree-sitter-javascript pins cc~1.0.90 while libsqlite3-sys requires cc^1.1.6
bug_entries.fix: Excluded lint crates from workspace (temporary). Permanent: upgrade tree-sitter-javascript or separate workspace
bug_entries.pattern_regex: failed to select a version for `cc`.*tree-sitter.*conflict

bug_entries.title: Incremental Dependency Discovery
bug_entries.symptom: Multiple build iterations needed; each reveals new conflicts
bug_entries.cause: No pre-build audit of all dependencies; fixes applied iteratively
bug_entries.fix: Comprehensive grep audit before any fixes, batch-fix all crates, single build

bug_entries.title: Unix Commands in PowerShell
bug_entries.symptom: The term 'tail' is not recognized as a name of a cmdlet
bug_entries.cause: Scripts use Unix commands (tail, head, grep) not available in Windows PowerShell
bug_entries.fix: Replace tail with Select-Object -Last, head with Get-Content -TotalCount N, grep with Select-String

bug_entries.title: WASM read_memory Immutable Caller
bug_entries.symptom: error: method `read` not found for `&Caller`
bug_entries.cause: Memory::read requires &mut Caller, not &Caller
bug_entries.fix: Changed read_memory signature to fn read_memory(caller: &mut Caller<'_, T>, ...) and imported AsContextMut

bug_entries.title: Missing AsContext Import
bug_entries.symptom: error: cannot find method `as_context` in this scope
bug_entries.cause: AsContext trait not imported; method is from trait impl
bug_entries.fix: Added `use wasmtime::AsContext;` at top of file

bug_entries.title: WASM Memory Functions Stubs
bug_entries.symptom: WASM contracts silently fail to read/write state
bug_entries.cause: Memory functions read_bytes, write_bytes, write_u32 were empty stubs
bug_entries.fix: Implemented real Memory::read/write using wasmtime::Memory with proper bounds checking

bug_entries.title: Missing num_cpus Dependency
bug_entries.symptom: error: cannot find crate `num_cpus`
bug_entries.cause: Crate used but not declared in Cargo.toml
bug_entries.fix: Added `num_cpus = "1.0"` to [dependencies]

bug_entries.title: Missing wat Dev Dependency
bug_entries.symptom: error: cannot find crate `wat` (test compilation)
bug_entries.cause: Test code uses wat but not in [dev-dependencies]
bug_entries.fix: Added `wat = "1.0"` to [dev-dependencies]

bug_entries.title: todo!() in IPC Handler
bug_entries.symptom: thread panicked at 'not yet implemented' in handle_execute_request
bug_entries.cause: handle_execute_request in ipc.rs was a todo!() placeholder
bug_entries.fix: Implemented real handler using OnceCell to access global scheduler and return TxResult

bug_entries.title: Missing once_cell Dependency
bug_entries.symptom: error: cannot find crate `once_cell`
bug_entries.cause: OnceCell singleton pattern used but crate not declared
bug_entries.fix: Added `once_cell = "1.19"` to [dependencies]

bug_entries.title: Unchecked WASM Memory Read Errors
bug_entries.symptom: WASM memory read returns garbage; errors silently ignored
bug_entries.cause: read_memory ignored mem.read() errors with `let _ =`
bug_entries.fix: Checked errors, cleared buffers on failure, logged issues

bug_entries.title: Blockchain Event Handlers Not Wired
bug_entries.symptom: Blockchain events defined but never processed; crash handling ignored
bug_entries.cause: BlockchainEvent handlers existed but not integrated into event loop
bug_entries.fix: Added try_parse_blockchain_event and integrated into main Survival event loop with handle_fork and handle_stale_leader

bug_entries.title: Insecure DePIN Signatures
bug_entries.symptom: Signatures easily forged; blake3 hash concatenation used for verification
bug_entries.cause: Toy signature verification using blake3::hash instead of cryptographic signatures
bug_entries.fix: Replaced with ed25519_dalek verification including verify_uptime and verify_coverage functions

bug_entries.title: Incomplete DePIN Verification Replacement
bug_entries.symptom: Original verify_uptime not replaced, only new function added
bug_entries.cause: Partial fix left old insecure verification logic in place
bug_entries.fix: Replaced entire verification logic, added comprehensive unit tests

bug_entries.title: Toy TSS Implementation
bug_entries.symptom: Threshold signatures insecure; XOR of random scalars used
bug_entries.cause: TSS implementation used toy XOR combination of random scalars, not real threshold scheme
bug_entries.fix: Replaced with frost_ed25519 crate: proper generate_keys, round1_commit, round2_sign, combine, verify_combined

bug_entries.title: TSS Missing Sign Method
bug_entries.symptom: FrostSigner only has verify, no sign method
bug_entries.cause: Incomplete TSS implementation missing cryptographic signing
bug_entries.fix: Added complete sign/combine/verify pipeline with full FROST round implementation and unit tests

bug_entries.title: Missing PID Controller Tests
bug_entries.symptom: No tests for adjust_difficulty or adjust_base_fee; changes could silently break
bug_entries.cause: Critical governance functions untested
bug_entries.fix: Added 4 comprehensive tests covering difficulty increase/decrease, clamping, and PID convergence

bug_entries.title: crystal_swap No Fallback
bug_entries.symptom: Upgrade fails without explanation if nexus-update or UOSC-verify missing
bug_entries.cause: External binary called without existence check or fallback
bug_entries.fix: Added existence check with `which`, implemented local BLAKE3 hash fallback, added error logging

bug_entries.title: Ethereum Light Client Weak PoW
bug_entries.symptom: Client accepts invalid blocks; only checks 8 bytes of difficulty
bug_entries.cause: PoW verification used u64::from_be_bytes(&hash[..8]) instead of 256-bit comparison
bug_entries.fix: Implemented is_pow_valid with max_uint256_div for full 256-bit difficulty comparison

bug_entries.title: Bitcoin Header Parsing Fragile
bug_entries.symptom: Header parsing assumes offset 4 for version without validation
bug_entries.cause: No length check; fragile fixed-offset parsing
bug_entries.fix: Added explicit 80-byte header validation with proper named offset constants

bug_entries.title: Missing Light Client Helpers
bug_entries.symptom: bits_to_target and u256_from_bytes functions missing
bug_entries.cause: Helper functions not implemented
bug_entries.fix: Implemented complete bits_to_target and u256_from_bytes with proper endianness handling

bug_entries.title: TransferClientError Not Convertible
bug_entries.symptom: Type mismatch: TransferClientError vs anyhow::Error in bridge adapter
bug_entries.cause: Custom error type doesn't implement Into<anyhow::Error>
bug_entries.fix: Added .context() and map_err(|e| anyhow!(e)) conversions at error boundaries

bug_entries.title: Dead Code: write_buffer
bug_entries.symptom: warning: field `write_buffer` never used
bug_entries.cause: Buffer exists for future duplex framing but unused
bug_entries.fix: Added #[allow(dead_code)] with comment explaining intent

bug_entries.title: Private Interface Warnings
bug_entries.symptom: warning: field is private but documented as public
bug_entries.cause: StreamReadHalf/StreamWriteHalf trait aliases triggered private interface warnings
bug_entries.fix: Made traits pub, added #[allow(private_interfaces)] on constructor

bug_entries.title: Missing Arc Import
bug_entries.symptom: error: cannot find std::sync::Arc in scope
bug_entries.cause: Arc import lost after refactoring
bug_entries.fix: Re-added `use std::sync::Arc;`

bug_entries.title: Crate Missing Entirely
bug_entries.symptom: Cannot use bonsai-transfer-client; API Bridge has no native P2P transport
bug_entries.cause: Crate didn't exist
bug_entries.fix: Created complete crate with client.rs, session.rs, stream.rs, framing.rs, error.rs modules

bug_entries.title: Transfer Client Error Type Mismatch
bug_entries.symptom: Wrapper type mismatch: TransferClientError vs anyhow::Error
bug_entries.cause: Error conversion missing in adapter
bug_entries.fix: Added proper error type conversion with context() chain

bug_entries.title: Missing bytes Dependency
bug_entries.symptom: error: cannot find type `Bytes` (uses Bytes/BytesMut)
bug_entries.cause: Bytes types used but crate not in Cargo.toml
bug_entries.fix: Added `bytes = "1"` to [dependencies]

bug_entries.title: Lifetime Issue in gateway.rs
bug_entries.symptom: error: value does not live long enough with tokio::spawn
bug_entries.cause: MatchedPath borrow outlived async spawn block
bug_entries.fix: Cloned MatchedPath before moving into tokio::spawn or used Arc for ownership

bug_entries.title: Unused Import
bug_entries.symptom: warning: unused import `MatchedPath`
bug_entries.cause: Import no longer needed after refactoring
bug_entries.fix: Removed unused import

bug_entries.title: Dead Code Placeholders
bug_entries.symptom: warning: field is never used (circuit_breaker, webhook, oidc modules)
bug_entries.cause: Intentional future gates
bug_entries.fix: Suppressed with #[allow(dead_code)] and explanatory comments

bug_entries.title: Missing gRPC build.rs
bug_entries.symptom: error: tonic failed to find proto file
bug_entries.cause: Proto files not compiled in build step
bug_entries.fix: Added build.rs with tonic_build::configure().compile(&["proto/bridge.proto"], &["proto"])

bug_entries.title: Private RelayClient API
bug_entries.symptom: error: method `send` is private; bridge cannot use relay transport
bug_entries.cause: Raw frame send method was private
bug_entries.fix: Exported clone_raw_sender() and send() as public API methods

bug_entries.title: Orchestrator Module Missing
bug_entries.symptom: error: cannot find module `orchestrator`
bug_entries.cause: Module declared in .rs file but not registered in lib.rs
bug_entries.fix: Added `pub mod orchestrator;` to lib.rs

bug_entries.title: Tools Not Registered in Dispatcher
bug_entries.symptom: MCP tools bug_hunt_tools.rs and lint_tools.rs don't appear in tool list
bug_entries.cause: Tools not registered in tool_registry.rs dispatcher
bug_entries.fix: Added tools to tool_registry.rs with JSON schemas and async handler implementations

bug_entries.title: Tool Routing Falls Through
bug_entries.symptom: New tools not callable; calls fall through to CLI
bug_entries.cause: bridge.rs call_bonsai() didn't check TOOL_REGISTRY before CLI
bug_entries.fix: Modified call_bonsai() to check TOOL_REGISTRY first, then fall back to CLI

bug_entries.title: BugHunt Command Not Wired
bug_entries.symptom: error: `bonsai bug-hunt scan` command not recognized
bug_entries.cause: Command dispatch not implemented in main.rs
bug_entries.fix: Added Commands::BugHunt variant and handler, integrated bug_hunt.rs module with clap subcommands

bug_entries.title: Lint Modules Not Exported
bug_entries.symptom: error: module `persistent_cache` is private
bug_entries.cause: Modules created but not exported from engine/mod.rs
bug_entries.fix: Added `pub mod persistent_cache; pub mod dependency_graph;` and pub use statements

bug_entries.title: Missing KDB Sync Import
bug_entries.symptom: error: cannot find type `MetricsCollector` (used in etl/kdb_sync.rs)
bug_entries.cause: etl/kdb_sync.rs called MetricsCollector without importing bonsai_kdb_sync crate
bug_entries.fix: Added bonsai_kdb_sync dependency and imported MetricsCollector

bug_entries.title: Collaboration Manager Missing
bug_entries.symptom: error: cannot find module `collaboration` (in collaboration/manager.rs context)
bug_entries.cause: Team profile application had no integration point
bug_entries.fix: Created collaboration/manager.rs module with apply_team_profile() implementation

bug_entries.title: Missing linfa Dependency
bug_entries.symptom: error: cannot find crate `linfa`
bug_entries.cause: predictive/predictor.rs uses linfa without adding crate dependency
bug_entries.fix: Added `linfa = "0.7"`, `linfa-trees = "0.7"` to [dependencies]

bug_entries.title: External Binary Without Fallback
bug_entries.symptom: axiom verify fails if axiom binary not in PATH
bug_entries.cause: phase_c/axiom_verifier.rs called axiom without PATH fallback
bug_entries.fix: Added `which` check and informative error message with fallback

bug_entries.title: Lint MCP Tools Missing
bug_entries.symptom: Lint tools not available in MCP server
bug_entries.cause: Tools created but not registered in dispatcher
bug_entries.fix: Added to tool_registry.rs with full handler implementations and JSON schemas

bug_entries.title: Regex Version Conflict
bug_entries.symptom: error: failed to select a version for `regex` (v0.2 vs v1.10)
bug_entries.cause: Transitive dependency conflict in remote-desktop
bug_entries.fix: Applied `cargo update -p regex --precise 1.10.4` and cargo patch config
bug_entries.pattern_regex: failed to select a version for `regex`.*0\.2.*1\.10

bug_entries.title: Regex Transitive Mismatch
bug_entries.symptom: error: conflicting requirements for `regex`
bug_entries.cause: Android bridge pulled in old regex version transitively
bug_entries.fix: Applied same regex unification fix as BUG-045

bug_entries.title: Android White Screen
bug_entries.symptom: App launches but shows only white screen (no UI)
bug_entries.cause: setContent not called with proper Compose theme
bug_entries.fix: Ensured setContent called with proper theme and BonsaiBuddyApp() composable

bug_entries.title: Missing RemoteDesktopScreen
bug_entries.symptom: RemoteDesktopScreen not integrated in navigation
bug_entries.cause: Screen created but not added to navigation graph
bug_entries.fix: Added RemoteDesktopScreen route to navigation graph with proper parameters

bug_entries.title: Hand-Edited tools.rs Malformed
bug_entries.symptom: MCP server tools have duplicates, broken JSON schemas
bug_entries.cause: Tools manually edited instead of generated
bug_entries.fix: Switched to generating tools.rs from YAML manifest using generate-tools crate

bug_entries.title: Blockchain Event Loop Integration
bug_entries.symptom: Blockchain events not processed; crash handling ignored
bug_entries.cause: Event handlers defined but not integrated into main event loop
bug_entries.fix: Integrated try_parse_blockchain_event into main survival event loop

bug_entries.title: PID Controller Untested
bug_entries.symptom: adjust_difficulty could break silently without tests
bug_entries.cause: Critical governance functions not covered by tests
bug_entries.fix: Added 4 comprehensive tests: convergence, clamping, edge cases, output stability

bug_entries.title: Incomplete Verification Replacement
bug_entries.symptom: Original insecure verify_uptime not replaced; only new function added
bug_entries.cause: Partial fix left old logic in place
bug_entries.fix: Replaced entire verification logic with ed25519_dalek and added unit tests

bug_entries.title: Light Client PoW Verification Weak
bug_entries.symptom: Only 8 bytes of PoW checked; 256-bit difficulty ignored
bug_entries.cause: Difficulty comparison incomplete; hash truncated
bug_entries.fix: Implemented full is_pow_valid with max_uint256_div for 256-bit comparison

bug_entries.title: WASM Memory Stubs
bug_entries.symptom: Contracts fail to access state; read/write return nothing
bug_entries.cause: Memory functions are empty stubs without real implementation
bug_entries.fix: Implemented with wasmtime::Memory access, proper error handling, bounds checking

bug_entries.title: Tool Definition Generation
bug_entries.symptom: tools.rs hand-edited; duplicates and schema errors
bug_entries.cause: No automated generation pipeline
bug_entries.fix: Created YAML manifest as single source of truth with generate-tools crate pipeline
